hero.heading: Chrome Extension Coming Soon
hero.title: Your e-mails sound like a Robot. Let's fix that!
hero.subtitle: Reply 10x faster or keep drowning in unread emails. Your funeral. 💀
hero.feature1: Write passive-aggressive replies even your mother would approve of.

features.heading: Powerful Features for
features.subtitle: Everything you need to transform your email productivity and never struggle with writing responses again

smart_reply.title: Smart Reply Generation
smart_reply.description: Generate contextual responses instantly with AI that understands tone and intent.

tone_detection.title: Tone Detection
tone_detection.description: Automatically detect if emails are formal, casual, urgent, or positive/negative.

email_summarization.title: Email Summarization
email_summarization.description: Get key points from long emails in 3-5 sentences to save time.

style_customization.title: Style Customization
style_customization.description: Choose from formal, casual, concise, or persuasive writing styles.

reply_only_when_needed.title: Replies only when you need them
reply_only_when_needed.description: No confusing drafts cluttering your inbox. Replie only generates a response when you ask for it.

one_click_responses.title: One-Click Responses
one_click_responses.description: Pre-generated quick replies for common email scenarios and questions.

features.footer: Works seamlessly with Gmail and Outlook

how_it_works.title: How It
how_it_works.subtitle: Get started in minutes and transform your email experience forever

1.title: Install Extension
1.description: Add  to Chrome and connect your Gmail or Outlook account

2.title: Open Any Email
2.description: Our AI panel appears automatically when you open emails that need responses

3.title: Generate & Send
3.description: Choose your preferred tone, generate smart replies, and send with confidence

video.title: See It In Action
video.description: Watch how Replie transforms a complex email into a perfect response

differentiation.heading: Designed to assist,
differentiation.subtitle: Some tools auto-generate drafts for every email, even when no reply is needed. That can feel distracting. With Replie, you stay in control. Just click when you want help, and get the perfect response instantly.

waitlist.title: Join the
waitlist.description: We are looking for early adopters to join our waitlist.

terms.link: By joining the waitlist, you agree to our terms and conditions.
content: By joining the waitlist, you confirm that you are at least 18 years old and have the legal capacity to accept these terms.
The waitlist fee is a fully refundable deposit, write us anytime for a refund.
The service is under heavy development. Full terms and conditions, use policy details and feature roadmap will be revealed to waitlist members as they are finalised leading up to our launch.

Signing up for the waitlist does not oblige you to make a recurring payment. The waitlist is a one-off payment of 1 american dollar that will credit you with 6 months of usage when the service launches. You can always choose not to enroll for recurring payments when we launch.
Our expected launch price is 10 american dollars per month. This is subject to change.
If the launch price increases compared to your waitlist deposit: You will still get the month rewards you originally paid for, no additional payment required.
If the launch price decreases compared to your waitlist deposit: We will top up the bonus months you receive on a pro rata basis.
In case we don't proceed all deposits will be refunded.
You can always cancel your waitlist enrollment at any time and your deposit will be refunded.
